scripts.restart: node --input-type=module -e "import{readFileSync,mkdirSync}from'fs';mkdirSync('system/logs',{recursive:true});try{var p=parseInt(readFileSync('./system/temp/app.pid','utf8'));process.kill(p,'SIGTERM');console.log('[restart] killed',p)}catch(e){console.log('[restart]','no running instance')}" 2>/dev/null;sleep 1;nohup node --expose-gc app.js >> system/logs/startup.log 2>&1 &
